mapper.select: select t.AUTH_TMPL_ID, t.AUTH_TMPL_NAME, t.status, t.LAST_CHG_DT, t.LAST_CHG_USR, t.PRIORITY, t.SQL_NAME, t.SQL_STRING from admin_sm_data_auth_tmpl t ${ew.customSqlSegment}

select a.AUTH_ID, a.AUTH_TMPL_ID, a.CONTR_ID, t.AUTH_TMPL_NAME, t.SQL_NAME, t.SQL_STRING from admin_sm_data_auth a LEFT JOIN admin_sm_data_auth_tmpl t ON a.AUTH_TMPL_ID = t.AUTH_TMPL_ID ${ew.customSqlSegment} order by a.AUTH_ID

select distinct t.auth_tmpl_id, t.auth_tmpl_name, t.sql_name, t.sql_string, case when a.contr_id is not null then 1 else 0 end as mark from admin_sm_data_auth_tmpl t left join admin_sm_data_auth a on a.auth_tmpl_id = t.auth_tmpl_id and (a.contr_id = #{contrId} or a.auth_tmpl_id in #{lastTmplIds}) ${ew.customSqlSegment}

select a.AUTH_ID, a.AUTH_TMPL_ID, a.CONTR_ID, t.AUTH_TMPL_NAME, t.SQL_NAME, t.SQL_STRING, t.PRIORITY from admin_sm_data_auth a LEFT JOIN admin_sm_data_auth_tmpl t ON a.AUTH_TMPL_ID = t.AUTH_TMPL_ID ${ew.customSqlSegment}

select t.AUTH_TMPL_ID, t.AUTH_TMPL_NAME, t.SQL_NAME, t.SQL_STRING, t.PRIORITY, t.status from admin_sm_data_auth a LEFT JOIN admin_sm_data_auth_tmpl t ON a.AUTH_TMPL_ID = t.AUTH_TMPL_ID where a.CONTR_ID = #{contrId}
AND a.data_tenant_id = #{dataTenantId}

select r.menu_id as contr_id, r.auth_reco_id, t.auth_tmpl_id, t.auth_tmpl_name, t.sql_string, t.sql_name, t.priority from admin_sm_auth_reco r LEFT JOIN admin_sm_data_auth_tmpl t ON r.AUTHRES_ID = t.AUTH_TMPL_ID ${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT t.auth_tmpl_id, t.auth_tmpl_name, t.sql_name, t.sql_string, case when a.AUTH_ID is not null then 1 else 0 end AS mark FROM admin_sm_data_auth_tmpl t LEFT JOIN (select `AUTH_ID`, `CONTR_ID`, `AUTH_TMPL_ID`, `LAST_CHG_USR`, `LAST_CHG_DT`, `DATA_TENANT_ID` from admin_sm_data_auth where CONTR_ID = #{contrId}) a on t.AUTH_TMPL_ID = a.AUTH_TMPL_ID ${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT t.auth_tmpl_id, t.auth_tmpl_name, t.sql_name, t.sql_string, case when a.AUTH_ID is not null then 1 else 0 end AS mark FROM admin_sm_data_auth a LEFT JOIN (select `AUTH_TMPL_ID`, `AUTH_TMPL_NAME`, `SQL_STRING`, `SQL_NAME`, `STATUS`, `LAST_CHG_USR`, `LAST_CHG_DT`, `PRIORITY`, `DATA_TENANT_ID` from admin_sm_data_auth_tmpl ${ew.customSqlSegment}) t on t.AUTH_TMPL_ID = a.AUTH_TMPL_ID where a.CONTR_ID = #{contrId}

SELECT t.auth_tmpl_id, t.auth_tmpl_name, t.sql_name, t.sql_string, case when a.AUTH_ID != null then 1 else 0 end AS mark FROM admin_sm_data_auth a LEFT JOIN admin_sm_data_auth_tmpl t on t.AUTH_TMPL_ID = a.AUTH_TMPL_ID where a.contr_id = #{contrId}
SELECT auth_tmpl_id, auth_tmpl_name, sql_name, sql_string FROM admin_sm_data_auth_tmpl ${ew.customSqlSegment}
